name: Stream object detection: a real clip flows over the `video` data channel; a YOLO11n + ByteTrack detector drains it, recognizes objects frame-by-frame, and emits each on the `detections` control channel; a consumer-edge gather folds them into a per-class report. LIVE-ONLY (the detector pip-installs ultralytics/torch + downloads yolo11n.pt — far past the 60 s test cap on a cold run); run via `mekhan run … --start-tokens sample-input.json` and read the instance outputs.
